stories.title: A Busy Morning for Oliver
sentences: Oliver is a clever puppy and he has a busy day.
He usually gets up at 6:30 in the morning.
Then he does morning exercises with his owner in the park.
Oliver often eats breakfast at 7:30 a.m.
After that, he helps clean the floor with a big cloth.
When do you go to school, Oliver?
He doesn't go to school, but he plays with a plastic ball.
Sometimes he sleeps under the table in the afternoon.
He is always happy because he likes his life.
Oliver is a very good helper at home.

questions.question: Oliver usually gets up at 7:30.
questions.explanation: The story says Oliver usually gets up at 6:30, not 7:30.

questions.question: What does Oliver do in the park?
questions.explanation: The story mentions he does morning exercises with his owner in the park.

questions.question: Oliver cleans the floor with a big ________.
questions.explanation: The text states he helps clean the floor with a big cloth.

stories.title: Zhang Peng's Weekend
sentences: Today is Saturday and Zhang Peng is very busy.
He often cleans his room at 9:00 a.m.
Usually, he goes for a walk after that.
He plays football with his friends in the afternoon.
When do you do your homework, Zhang Peng?
I usually do my homework at 7:00 p.m.
Sometimes I watch TV with my parents in the evening.
I always go to bed at 9:30.
My weekend is very hard but fun.
I like my busy Saturdays very much.

questions.question: Zhang Peng cleans his room at ________ a.m.
questions.explanation: The text says he often cleans his room at 9:00 a.m.

questions.question: What does Zhang Peng do in the afternoon?
questions.explanation: The story says he plays football with his friends in the afternoon.

questions.question: Zhang Peng always goes to bed at nine thirty.
questions.explanation: The story confirms he always goes to bed at 9:30.

stories.title: Zhang Peng's Color Palette
sentences: Zhang Peng likes painting pictures of the four seasons.
In spring, he paints green grass and beautiful flowers.
Today is a sunny day in summer.
Which season do you like best?
I like summer best because I can go swimming in the lake.
Everything is bright and the trees are green.
But my brother likes autumn best.
He likes to pick apples with our grandparents on the farm.
The brown bread and grapes there are very delicious.
He thinks autumn is the best season of all.
vocabulary_used: Which season do you like best?

questions.question: Zhang Peng likes summer because he can go swimming.
questions.explanation: The story says 'I like summer best because I can go swimming in the lake.'

questions.question: What does Zhang Peng's brother like to do in autumn?
questions.explanation: The story mentions: 'He likes to pick apples with our grandparents on the farm.'

questions.question: The story says the grapes and ____ ____ are very delicious.
questions.explanation: The text states: 'The brown bread and grapes there are very delicious.'

stories.title: Sarah and the Snowman
sentences: Winter comes and it is very cold now.
The ground is all white and beautiful.
Sarah puts on her warm clothes.
Which season do you like best, Sarah?
I like winter best because I like the snow.
I can make a snowman with my friends.
Look! My snowman has a big nose and green eyes.
We also go on a picnic in the snow.
It is great fun to play outside.
My mother says spring is too wet for her.
She likes the golden colors of autumn.
vocabulary_used: Which season do you like best?

questions.question: Sarah's mother likes spring best.
questions.explanation: The story says her mother thinks spring is too wet and she likes autumn.

questions.question: Why does Sarah like winter best?
questions.explanation: Sarah says: 'I like winter best because I like the snow.'

questions.question: Sarah and her friends ____ ____ ____ ____ in the snow.
questions.explanation: The story mentions 'We also go on a picnic in the snow.'

stories.title: Sarah's Busy Year
sentences: Sarah is looking at her new school calendar on the wall.
There are many fun things to do this year.
The school sports meet is in April.
Sarah wants to run and jump in the sun.
When is the school trip?
It is in May and the weather is warm.
In June, she will have a party for Children's Day.
She likes to eat chocolate and chicken for lunch at the party.
Summer vacation starts in July and August.
She will visit her grandma and wash her clothes.

questions.question: The school sports meet is in April.
questions.explanation: The story explicitly states 'The school sports meet is in April.'

questions.question: What is in May according to Sarah's calendar?
questions.explanation: The text says 'It is in May' referring to the school trip.

questions.question: Sarah likes to eat ____ and chicken for lunch at the party.
questions.explanation: The sentence in the story is 'She likes to eat chocolate and chicken for lunch at the party.'

stories.title: Zhang Peng's Favorite Holidays
sentences: Zhang Peng loves Chinese festivals and holidays.
New Year's Day is in January.
He often goes to the park with his family then.
Teachers' Day is in September.
He gives his teacher a beautiful shirt and a card.
When is China's National Day?
It is in October.
His mother says, 'We can go to the beach.'
They see many shells on the sand.
Zhang Peng is very happy in autumn.

questions.question: Teachers' Day is in October.
questions.explanation: The story states Teachers' Day is in September.

questions.question: What does Zhang Peng give his teacher?
questions.explanation: The story says 'He gives his teacher a beautiful shirt and a card.'

questions.question: National Day is in ____.
questions.explanation: The text answers the question 'When is China's National Day?' with 'It is in October.'

stories.title: Zhu Hui's Special Calendar
sentences: Zhu Hui has a very busy calendar at school.
The English party is on April 3rd.
The big art show is on May 5th.
Zhu Hui needs to draw three beautiful pictures for the show.
His mother's birthday is also in May.
It is on May 21st.
Zhu Hui wants to make a thin card for her.
When is the school sports meet?
It is on June 12th.
Zhu Hui is happy because he likes these special days.

questions.question: The art show is in April.
questions.explanation: The story says the art show is on May 5th.

questions.question: When is Zhu Hui's mother's birthday?
questions.explanation: The text states his mother's birthday is on May 21st.

questions.question: The English party is on _______.
questions.explanation: According to the second sentence, the party is on April 3rd.

stories.title: The Singing Contest
sentences: Zhang Peng and Sarah are good friends.
Today is March 1st.
They are talking about the school singing contest.
When is the singing contest?
It is on March 20th.
Sarah's birthday is on the same day.
She will be thirteen years old.
Zhang Peng will sing a song for her.
They both like the music teacher, Miss White.
The students are excited for the twentieth of March.

questions.question: Sarah's birthday is on March 20th.
questions.explanation: The story says the contest is March 20th and her birthday is on the same day.

questions.question: How old will Sarah be?
questions.explanation: The text mentions she will be thirteen years old.

questions.question: Today is _______.
questions.explanation: The second sentence identifies today as March 1st.

stories.title: A Day at the Dog Show
sentences: Zhang Peng and Sarah are at a big dog show today.
They see many cute dogs run around the park.
Look at that small white dog.
Whose dog is it?
Sarah says it is hers.
The dog is drinking water now.
Is that black dog yours, Zhang Peng?
No, it is not mine.
The black dog is jump-rope jumping and playing with a ball.
Its tail is long and it looks very happy.
Oh, those yellow dogs are theirs.
They are all having a lot of fun together.

questions.question: The small white dog belongs to Sarah.
questions.explanation: In the story, Sarah says 'it is hers' referring to the small white dog.

questions.question: What is the black dog doing?
options: It is sleeping under a tree.
It is jumping and playing with a ball.
It is eating a big bone.
questions.answer: It is jumping and playing with a ball.
questions.explanation: The text states the black dog is 'jump-rope jumping and playing with a ball.'

questions.question: Whose dogs are the yellow ones?
questions.explanation: The story says 'those yellow dogs are theirs'.

stories.title: The Singing Contest
sentences: Chen Jie is walking in the garden with her friends.
Suddenly, they hear a beautiful sound.
Is someone singing a song?
Yes, a little bird is singing in the tree.
Oliver finds a colorful bag on the pink bench.
Whose bag is this?
Is it yours, Chen Jie?
No, my bag is green, so it is not mine.
Wu Binbin says, 'It is ours! We forgot it here.'
They are thinking about their lunch inside the bag.
Now they are eating and drinking under the tree.
They are very happy to find the bag.

questions.question: Chen Jie's bag is colorful.
questions.explanation: Chen Jie says her bag is green, not the colorful one found on the bench.

questions.question: Who does the bag belong to?
questions.explanation: Wu Binbin says 'It is ours!', meaning it belongs to him and his group.

questions.question: What is the bird doing in the tree?
questions.explanation: The story mentions 'a little bird is singing in the tree'.

stories.title: A Quiet Visit to the Library
sentences: Today is Sunday morning and the sun is shining.
Zhang Peng and John are at the school library.
They are looking for some books about space.
Zhang Peng sees a sign on the white wall.
The sign says, 'Talk quietly' and 'Keep your desk clean'.
John is talking to Zhang Peng about a robot.
Zhang Peng says, 'Shh, we must follow the rules'.
Are they playing games in the library?
No, they are reading silently at the desk.
They want to be good students today.

questions.question: Zhang Peng and John are in the school library.
questions.explanation: The second sentence says they are at the school library.

questions.question: What does the sign on the wall say?
questions.explanation: The story mentions the sign says 'Talk quietly' and 'Keep your desk clean'.

questions.question: Where are they reading their books?
questions.explanation: The text states they are reading silently at the desk.

stories.title: Fun at the Science Museum
sentences: Whose bag is this on the floor?
It is Sarah's, but she is busy now.
She is visiting the museum with her brother.
They see many people and many cool things.
Is her brother running in the hall?
No, he is walking slowly on the right.
A teacher says, 'Keep to the right, please'.
They also see a sign that says, 'Take turns'.
They are waiting for their turn to see the stars.
They are having a great time at the museum.

questions.question: Sarah's brother is running in the hall.
questions.explanation: He is walking slowly on the right, not running.

questions.question: What rule does the teacher say to them?
questions.explanation: The teacher explicitly says 'Keep to the right, please' in the story.

questions.question: What does the second sign say?
questions.explanation: The text says they see a sign that says 'Take turns'.
